---
title: "Riesgo País"
subtitle: "EMBI Global Diversified — Serie Histórica"
date: last-modified
---

```{python}
#| label: setup-embi
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false



import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

url_embi_xls = "https://bcrdgdcprod.blob.core.windows.net/documents/entorno-internacional/documents/Serie_Historica_Spread_del_EMBI.xlsx"

try:
    df_embi = pd.read_excel(
        url_embi_xls,
        sheet_name=0,
        header=1,
        index_col=None
    )

    # Eliminar columnas Unnamed del final
    df_embi = df_embi.loc[:, ~df_embi.columns.str.startswith("Unnamed")]

    # La primera columna es la fecha (sea cual sea su nombre)
    df_embi = df_embi.rename(columns={df_embi.columns[0]: "fecha"})

    # Parsear fecha
    df_embi["fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(df_embi["fecha"], errors="coerce")
    df_embi = df_embi.replace("N/A", float("nan"))

    # Convertir a numérico
    cols_numericas = [c for c in df_embi.columns if c != "fecha"]
    df_embi[cols_numericas] = df_embi[cols_numericas].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")

    # Limpiar y ordenar
    df_embi = df_embi.dropna(subset=["fecha"]).sort_values("fecha").reset_index(drop=True)

    # Series derivadas
    df_chile = df_embi[["fecha", "Chile"]].dropna()
    paises   = ["Chile", "Brasil", "Colombia", "México", "Perú", "Argentina"]
    df_latam = df_embi[["fecha"] + paises].copy()

    ultimo_valor = df_chile["Chile"].iloc[-1]
    ultima_fecha = df_chile["fecha"].iloc[-1].strftime("%d/%m/%Y")

except Exception as e:
    display(Markdown(f"**Error al cargar datos:** `{e}`"))
    df_embi      = pd.DataFrame()
    df_chile     = pd.DataFrame({"fecha": [], "Chile": []})
    df_latam     = pd.DataFrame()
    paises       = []
    ultimo_valor = None
    ultima_fecha = "Sin datos"


# --- Tabla: últimos 10 días ---
if not df_embi.empty:
    paises_tabla = ["Chile", "Brasil", "Colombia", "México", "Perú", "Argentina"]
    df_tabla_embi = df_embi[["fecha"] + paises_tabla].dropna(subset=["Chile"]).tail(10).copy()
    df_tabla_embi = df_tabla_embi.sort_values("fecha", ascending=False)
    df_tabla_embi["fecha"] = df_tabla_embi["fecha"].dt.strftime("%d/%m/%Y")

    tabla_md = "| Fecha | Chile | Brasil | Colombia | México | Perú | Argentina |\n"
    tabla_md += "|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|\n"
    for _, row in df_tabla_embi.iterrows():
        def fmt(v):
            return f"{v:.2f}%" if pd.notna(v) else "—"
        tabla_md += (
            f"| {row['fecha']} "
            f"| {fmt(row['Chile'])} "
            f"| {fmt(row['Brasil'])} "
            f"| {fmt(row['Colombia'])} "
            f"| {fmt(row['México'])} "
            f"| {fmt(row['Perú'])} "
            f"| {fmt(row['Argentina'])} |\n"
        )

    display(Markdown("### Últimos Datos por País"))
    display(Markdown(tabla_md))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false

# --- KPIs ---
if ultimo_valor is not None:
    display(Markdown(f"""
> **Último dato ({ultima_fecha}):** EMBI Chile = **{ultimo_valor:.2f}%**
"""))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false



# --- Gráfico 1: Serie histórica Chile ---
if not df_chile.empty:
    fig1 = go.Figure()

    fig1.add_trace(
        go.Scatter(
            x=df_chile["fecha"],
            y=df_chile["Chile"],
            mode="lines",
            name="EMBI Chile",
            line=dict(color="#c0392b", width=2),
            fill="tozeroy",
            fillcolor="rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)",
            hovertemplate="<b>%{x|%d %b %Y}</b><br>EMBI Chile: %{y:.2f}%<extra></extra>",
        )
    )

    fig1.update_layout(
        title=dict(
            text="EMBI Chile — Serie Histórica Completa",
            x=0.5, xanchor="center", font=dict(size=18)
        ),
        template="plotly_white",
        font_family="Inter",
        height=420,
        autosize=True,
        hovermode="x unified",
        yaxis=dict(
            title="Spread (%)", tickformat=".2f",
            gridcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", zeroline=False, rangemode="tozero"
        ),
        xaxis=dict(
            tickformat="%Y", showgrid=False,
            rangeslider=dict(visible=True)
        ),
        margin=dict(l=70, r=40, t=80, b=60)
    )

    fig1.show(config={"displayModeBar": True})
else:
    display(Markdown("_No hay datos disponibles._"))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false


# --- Gráfico 2: Comparación todos los países ---
if not df_embi.empty:
    paises_todos = [c for c in df_embi.columns if c != "fecha"]

    # Paleta de alto contraste, colores bien diferenciados
    paleta = {
        "Global":       "#1f77b4",
        "LATINO":       "#ff7f0e",
        "REP DOM":      "#2ca02c",
        "Argentina":    "#27d3d6",
        "Bolivia":      "#9467bd",
        "Brasil":       "#8c564b",
        "Chile":        "#e377c2",
        "Colombia":     "#7f7f7f",
        "Costa Rica":   "#bcbd22",
        "Ecuador":      "#cfc917",
        "El Salvador":  "#aec7e8",
        "Guatemala":    "#ffbb78",
        "Honduras":     "#98df8a",
        "México":       "#ff9896",
        "Paraguay":     "#c5b0d5",
        "Perú":         "#c49c94",
        "Panamá":       "#f7b6d2",
        "Uruguay":      "#dbdb8d",
        "Venezuela":    "#c7c7c7",  # gris — oculto por defecto
        "RD-LATINO":    "#9edae5",
    }

    # Países que se ocultan por defecto por distorsionar la escala
    ocultos = {"Venezuela", "RD-LATINO", "Honduras", "Guatemala", "Bolivia", "Costa Rica", "El Salvador", "Paraguay", "Perú", "Panamá","Uruguay" }

    fig2 = go.Figure()

    for pais in paises_todos:
        serie = df_embi[["fecha", pais]].dropna()
        if not serie.empty:
            fig2.add_trace(
                go.Scatter(
                    x=serie["fecha"],
                    y=serie[pais],
                    mode="lines",
                    name=pais,
                    visible="legendonly" if pais in ocultos else True,
                    line=dict(
                        color=paleta.get(pais, "#333333"),
                        width=2.5
                    ),
                    hovertemplate=f"<b>%{{x|%d %b %Y}}</b><br>{pais}: %{{y:.2f}}%<extra></extra>",
                )
            )

    fig2.update_layout(
        title=dict(
            text="Comparación EMBI — Todos los Países",
            x=0.5,
            xanchor="center",
            font=dict(size=18),
            y=0.9           # título bien arriba
        ),
        template="plotly_white",
        font_family="Inter",
        height=560,
        autosize=True,
        hovermode="x unified",
        legend=dict(
            orientation="h",
            yanchor="top",
            y=-1,         # leyenda debajo del gráfico
            xanchor="center",
            x=0.5,
            font=dict(size=11)
        ),
        yaxis=dict(
            title="Spread (%)",
            tickformat=".2f",
            gridcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",
            zeroline=False,
            rangemode="tozero"
        ),
        xaxis=dict(
            tickformat="%b %Y",
            showgrid=False,
            rangeslider=dict(visible=True)
        ),
        margin=dict(l=70, r=40, t=120, b=120)  # más espacio abajo para leyenda
    )

    fig2.show(config={"displayModeBar": True})
```

```{python}
#| echo: false


# --- Gráfico 3: Último valor por país (barras horizontales) ---
if not df_embi.empty:
    colores = {
        "Chile":     "#c0392b",
        "Brasil":    "#2980b9",
        "Colombia":  "#27ae60",
        "México":    "#e67e22",
        "Perú":      "#8e44ad",
        "Argentina": "#2c3e50",
    }

    paises_bar = ["Chile", "Brasil", "Colombia", "México", "Perú", "Argentina"]
    ultimos = {}
    for pais in paises_bar:
        if pais in df_embi.columns:
            serie = df_embi[["fecha", pais]].dropna()
            if not serie.empty:
                ultimos[pais] = serie[pais].iloc[-1]

    df_bar = pd.DataFrame(
        list(ultimos.items()), columns=["pais", "embi"]
    ).sort_values("embi")

    colores_bar = [colores.get(p, "#888") for p in df_bar["pais"]]

    fig3 = go.Figure()
    fig3.add_trace(
        go.Bar(
            x=df_bar["embi"],
            y=df_bar["pais"],
            orientation="h",
            marker_color=colores_bar,
            hovertemplate="<b>%{y}</b><br>EMBI: %{x:.2f}%<extra></extra>",
            text=df_bar["embi"].apply(lambda v: f"{v:.2f}%"),
            textposition="inside",
            textfont=dict(color="white", size=13)
        )
    )

    fig3.update_layout(
        title=dict(
            text="EMBI por País — Último Dato Disponible",
            x=0.5, xanchor="center", font=dict(size=18)
        ),
        template="plotly_white",
        font_family="Inter",
        height=380,
        autosize=True,
        xaxis=dict(
            title="Spread (%)", tickformat=".2f",
            gridcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", zeroline=False
        ),
        yaxis=dict(showgrid=False),
        margin=dict(l=90, r=80, t=80, b=50)
    )

    fig3.show(config={"displayModeBar": True})
```
